---
title: "Our Team"
---

::: {.team-grid}

::: {.team-member}
::: {.member-photo}
![](images/yash.jpg)
:::
::: {.member-name}for now
[Yash Mali](https://yashm8.github.io/)
:::
::: {.member-role}
Co-president
:::
:::

::: {.team-member}
::: {.member-photo}
![](images/antarip.jpeg)
:::
::: {.member-name}
Antarip Kashyap
:::
::: {.member-role}
Co-president
:::
:::

::: {.team-member}
::: {.member-photo}
![](images/aniket.jpeg)
:::
::: {.member-name}
Aniket Nemade
:::
::: {.member-role}
Treasurer
:::
:::

::: {.team-member}
::: {.member-photo}
![](images/irene.jpeg)
:::
::: {.member-name}
Irene Berezin
:::
::: {.member-role}
VP of Logistics
:::
:::

::: {.team-member}
::: {.member-photo}
![](images/leia.jpg)
:::
::: {.member-name}
Leia Chen
:::
::: {.member-role}
VP of Marketing
:::
:::

:::
